headings.usage: Use 900 for main titles, 300 for elegant contrast in subtitles

body.usage: Standard UI text, forms, list items, buttons

monospace.usage: Coordinates, algorithmic complexity O(n²·2ⁿ), DP states, distances, status logs, terminal outputs

rules: 95% of the UI must be strictly monochrome (Black, Grey, White).
Use Warning Yellow (#FDE047) EXCLUSIVELY for the computed optimal route, active CTAs, and pulsing depot.
Never use gradients for surfaces; rely on 1px solid borders (#27272A) and pure flat colors.

layout.spacing: Dense, technical spacing. p-4 to p-6 inside panels. gap-4 between dense data rows.
layout.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid (Mode B). The application is a literal dashboard. Strict grid hierarchy.

bento_spans.sidebar: col-span-1 lg:col-span-3 border-r border-[#27272A] h-[calc(100vh-64px)] overflow-y-auto bg-[#0F0F11]
bento_spans.bottom_status: col-span-full h-16 border-t border-[#27272A] bg-[#050505] flex items-center px-6

surfaces.panels: Flat Solid backgrounds (#0F0F11). 1px sharp inner border (border-white/10). No shadow. Sharp corners (rounded-none).
surfaces.canvas: Dark background with a technical dot-grid pattern. No borders inside the canvas area except the boundary.
surfaces.floating_cards: Glassmorphism for floating tooltips/metrics over the canvas: bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-[#27272A] shadow-2xl rounded-none.
surfaces.status_bar: Terminal-like status bar at the bottom. bg-[#050505] border-t border-[#27272A].

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-neutral-200 font-bold tracking-wide rounded-none px-6 py-3 transition-colors uppercase text-sm
buttons.accent: bg-[#FDE047] text-black hover:bg-[#FEF08A] font-bold tracking-wide rounded-none px-6 py-3 transition-colors uppercase text-sm shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(253,224,71,0.2)] hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(253,224,71,0.4)]
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-neutral-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-neutral-800 rounded-none border border-transparent hover:border-neutral-700 px-4 py-2 text-sm
buttons.danger: bg-transparent text-[#EF4444] hover:bg-[#EF4444]/10 rounded-none border border-transparent hover:border-[#EF4444]/50 px-4 py-2 text-sm

inputs.text: bg-[#050505] border border-[#27272A] focus:border-[#FDE047] rounded-none text-white font-mono placeholder:text-neutral-600 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FDE047] px-3 py-2
inputs.labels: text-[10px] font-mono uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-neutral-500 mb-1.5 block

canvas_elements.depot: w-5 h-5 bg-white rounded-none border-2 border-black flex items-center justify-center text-black font-bold text-[10px] shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,255,255,0.5)] z-20
canvas_elements.stop: w-3 h-3 bg-neutral-800 rounded-none border border-neutral-400 hover:border-white hover:bg-neutral-600 transition-colors cursor-pointer z-10
canvas_elements.route_line: Stroke width 2px, Color #FDE047. Drop-shadow filter for glow: drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(253,224,71,0.5)].
canvas_elements.distance_badge: bg-[#050505] text-[#FDE047] font-mono text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0.5 border border-[#27272A] absolute translate-y-[-50%] translate-x-[-50%]

components.tabs: border-b border-[#27272A] flex space-x-6. Active tab: text-white border-b-2 border-[#FDE047] pb-2 font-bold. Inactive: text-neutral-500 hover:text-neutral-300 pb-2 transition-colors

motion.route_drawing: Use framer-motion to draw the SVG path. transition={{ duration: 1.5, ease: 'easeInOut' }} on pathLength from 0 to 1.
motion.depot_pulse: Continuous scale 1 to 1.1 and opacity 1 to 0.5 pulse on the depot marker using framer-motion repeat: Infinity.
motion.panel_entrance: Slide in from left/bottom with opacity fade. Staggered children for list items (delay 0.05s) for a data-cascading effect.
motion.hover_states: Instant background color change, no slow fading for a snappy, precise, technical feel.

icons.usage: Use crisp, thin-line icons (stroke-width: 1.5). Size 20px for standard, 16px for dense lists. Do not use generic solid icons.

data_testing.rule: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes.

images.strategy: No raster images or stock photos should be used. Rely entirely on typography, SVG elements, CSS grids, and precise layout to achieve the technical algorithmic visualization aesthetic.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are working with .js files, NOT .tsx files. Write all React components in modern ES6+ .jsx/.js syntax.
Strictly adhere to the 95% monochrome rule. Color is only for functional mapping (the route, the depot, active states).
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the layout grid. Create a 12-column literal grid layout: sidebar (col-span-3) for algorithm metrics/list, canvas (col-span-9) for map.
For the canvas, use a dot-grid background using CSS radial-gradient (e.g., bg-[radial-gradient(#27272a_1px,transparent_1px)]).
Animate the route visualization using framer-motion SVG path drawing (<motion.path> with pathLength).
Data-heavy text (coordinates, distances, algorithm metrics like O(n²·2ⁿ), DP states) MUST use JetBrains Mono.
Headings MUST use Chivo (install via Google Fonts in index.html or import in CSS).
Body text MUST use IBM Plex Sans.
Build Shadcn components if needed, but strip their default rounded corners (force rounded-none) to match the Swiss Brutalist/Technical aesthetic.
Ensure the canvas is interactive (click to add nodes). Implement visual feedback when a node is added.
Display the route results in a dense, scannable format (like a terminal output or trading ledger) rather than fluffy cards.
Include a status bar at the bottom with solver health, node count, and contextual messages.
Ensure the Held-Karp exact DP algorithm logic (calling FastAPI) is properly integrated, handling loading states (O(n²·2ⁿ) takes time for n > 15).
